result.stdout:
Strawberry Shake GraphQL Generator

Usage:  [command] [options]

Options:
  -?|-h|--help  Show help information.

Commands:
  download      Download the schema as GraphQL SDL
  generate      Generates Strawberry Shake Clients
  init          Initialize project and download schema
  update        Update local schema
  where         Get the tool location

Run ' [command] -?|-h|--help' for more information about a command.

commands.payload:
Strawberry Shake GraphQL Generator

Usage:  [command] [options]

Options:
  -?|-h|--help  Show help information.

Commands:
  download      Download the schema as GraphQL SDL
  generate      Generates Strawberry Shake Clients
  init          Initialize project and download schema
  update        Update local schema
  where         Get the tool location

Run ' [command] -?|-h|--help' for more information about a command.

result.stdout:
Download the schema as GraphQL SDL

Usage:  download [options] <uri>

Arguments:
  uri              The URL to the GraphQL endpoint.

Options:
  -f|--FileName    The file name to store the schema SDL.
  -j|--json        Console output as JSON.
  -x|--headers     Custom headers used in request to Graph QL server. Can be
                   used multiple times. Example: --headers key1=value1 --headers
                   key2=value2
  -d|--typeDepth   The type depth used for the introspection request.
  --tokenEndpoint  The token endpoint uri.
  --clientId       The client id.
  --clientSecret   The client secret.
  --scope          A custom scope that shall be passed along with the token
                   request.
  --token          The token that shall be used to authenticate with the GraphQL
                   server.
  --scheme         The token scheme (default: bearer).
  --no-scheme      The token will be send without a scheme.
  -?|-h|--help     Show help information.

commands.payload:
Download the schema as GraphQL SDL

Usage:  download [options] <uri>

Options:

  -x|--headers     Custom headers used in request to Graph QL server. Can be

  -d|--typeDepth   The type depth used for the introspection request.

  --scope          A custom scope that shall be passed along with the token

result.stdout:
Generates Strawberry Shake Clients

Usage:  generate [options] <path>

Arguments:
  path                           The project directory.

Options:
  -n|--rootNamespace             The root namespace.
  -s|--disableSchemaValidation   Disable strict schema validation.
  -a|--hashAlgorithm             Request Hash Generation.
  -t|--disableStore              Disable the client store.
  -r|--razorComponents           Generate Razor components.
  -o|--outputDirectory           The output directory.
  -q|--operationOutputDirectory  The output directory for persisted operation
                                 files.
  --relayFormat                  Export persisted operations in the relay
                                 format.
  -j|--json                      Console output as JSON.
  -?|-h|--help                   Show help information.

commands.payload:
Generates Strawberry Shake Clients

Usage:  generate [options] <path>

Arguments:
  path                           The project directory.

Options:
  -n|--rootNamespace             The root namespace.
  -s|--disableSchemaValidation   Disable strict schema validation.
  -a|--hashAlgorithm             Request Hash Generation.
  -t|--disableStore              Disable the client store.
  -r|--razorComponents           Generate Razor components.
  -o|--outputDirectory           The output directory.
  -q|--operationOutputDirectory  The output directory for persisted operation
                                 files.
  --relayFormat                  Export persisted operations in the relay
                                 format.
  -j|--json                      Console output as JSON.
  -?|-h|--help                   Show help information.

result.stdout:
Initialize project and download schema

Usage:  init [options] <uri>

Arguments:
  uri              The URL to the GraphQL endpoint.

Options:
  -p|--Path        The directory where the client shall be located.
  -n|--clientName  The GraphQL client name.
  -j|--json        Console output as JSON.
  -x|--headers     Custom headers used in request to Graph QL server. Can be
                   used multiple times. Example: --headers key1=value1 --headers
                   key2=value2
  -f|--FromFile    Import schema from schema file.
  -d|--typeDepth   The type depth used for the introspection request.
  --tokenEndpoint  The token endpoint uri.
  --clientId       The client id.
  --clientSecret   The client secret.
  --scope          A custom scope that shall be passed along with the token
                   request.
  --token          The token that shall be used to authenticate with the GraphQL
                   server.
  --scheme         The token scheme (default: bearer).
  --no-scheme      The token will be send without a scheme.
  -?|-h|--help     Show help information.
